ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug for the article URL */,
  "body" TEXT /* Main content of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., published, draft) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the article's featured image */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the article */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the article */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the article */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "readme_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the article's README file */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the author */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the author's profile image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was last updated */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is associated with */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who commented */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The actual comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been moderated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the commenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
